description: Hourly timestamp in Asia/Kuala_Lumpur reference time.
past, present, or future relative to 2026-06-20 11:00:00.
Hour from 0 to 23.
0=Monday, 6=Sunday.
1 if Saturday or Sunday, otherwise 0.
Synthetic holiday flag for demo; replace with real supplier/calendar data.
1 for 08:00-21:59; daytime high tariff period.
1 for 22:00-07:59; nighttime low tariff period.
Hours until lower night tariff starts; 0 if already night.
Stable tariff period/version; changes at 2026-07-01 in this synthetic data.
RM/kWh before weekend or public holiday discount.
Discount applied for weekend/holiday.
Final tariff used for cost calculation.
Synthetic outdoor temperature.
Synthetic outdoor humidity.
